meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI-driven onboarding flows to debug code faster. A student-focused, intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for better builds.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just about syntax; it's about context. By implementing structured user onboarding, you force your application to define its state, variables, and dependencies clearly. This architectural clarity allows tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to map your logic, turning unfixable bugs into predictable, solvable execution paths.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal filled with red text, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat monitor for your dying project. You've spent hours hunting a bug that seems to move every time you get close. The frustration of being stuck isn't just a hurdle; it’s the primary barrier between a student and a professional engineer.

But here is the secret: you aren't failing because you can't code; you’re failing because your app lacks a defined state. By integrating a rigorous onboarding flow, you create a controlled environment that makes your codebase transparent. Let’s transform your debugging process from a guessing game into a surgical operation using the latest AI-native development tools.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Before you can debug, you must map the user journey. We use a state machine to ensure every variable is initialized before a user interacts with the core logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and generate a state machine diagram for a user onboarding flow that initializes all global variables and authentication tokens.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a state machine for user onboarding in src/onboarding.ts'

steps.title: Instrumenting Data Collection
steps.description: You can't fix what you can't see. We inject telemetry into the onboarding flow to track state transitions in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an instrumentation wrapper that logs state changes during the onboarding process without polluting the primary business logic.

steps.title: Isolating the Debugging Scope
steps.description: Use the onboarding flow to create a 'sandbox' mode. This allows you to test specific functions without running the entire application stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test harness that triggers the onboarding flow and exposes the internal state to the console for debugging purposes.

steps.title: Automated Error Boundary Synthesis
steps.description: Implement error boundaries that capture failures during onboarding, preventing the app from crashing and providing a clear stack trace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React Error Boundary component specifically for the onboarding screens that logs the component stack to the debugging terminal.

steps.title: Finalizing the Debugger Loop
steps.description: Connect the logs from your onboarding flow back into Claude Code to get proactive suggestions on why your code is failing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a summary report of the recent onboarding errors and suggest three potential fixes based on the logged state transitions.

pro_tips: Treat your onboarding flow as a unit test for your entire application infrastructure.
Always log the 'previous state' alongside the 'error state' to see the exact delta that triggered the crash.
Use Claude Code to generate synthetic test users that trigger every possible branch of your onboarding flow.
Keep onboarding logic decoupled from your main business logic to prevent circular dependency bugs.
If your code won't compile, use Antigravity to generate a simplified 'Minimal Reproducible Example' before asking for help.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is stable, start building out your core features using the same state-first approach. Document your journey in your portfolio to show potential employers how you handle complex debugging tasks.
content.conversion_block: Don't let a stubborn bug keep you from shipping your dream app. Master the tools, structure your code, and join the elite tier of developers who build with confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
